queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating impact of critical accounts or other existing credits on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Statistical evidence regarding the association between lacking a checking account and heightened probability of credit default.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk driven by checking account balances below zero and their contribution to increased default likelihood.
